title: Japanese Crispy Fermented Mozzarella
description: A unique and savory fusion of Japanese and Italian flavors. This crispy fermented mozzarella is perfect as a snack or appetizer.

ingredients.name: crunchy
ingredients.notes: peanut or rice flour for coating

instructions: Cut the fermented mozzarella into 1-inch cubes.
In a shallow dish, mix together the halal soy sauce and mirin.
Dip each cube of mozzarella into the soy sauce mixture, coating completely.
Then, roll the coated mozzarella in the crunchy coating until evenly covered.
Heat about 1/2 inch of sesame oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
When the oil is hot, add a few of the coated mozzarella cubes to the skillet (do not overcrowd).
Fry the mozzarella until golden brown and crispy on all sides, about 2-3 minutes.
Remove the fried mozzarella from the oil with a slotted spoon and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Repeat the frying process with the remaining mozzarella cubes.
Serve the crispy fermented mozzarella hot, garnished with chopped green onions and toasted sesame seeds. Enjoy!
